summary: Ukrainian forces downed a Russian Ka-52 helicopter near Nadiivka, Donetsk region, with FPV drones, striking both the crash site and evacuation attempt. In another incident, an FPV drone hit a Ukrainian BUK air defense system near Bolshoy Sokolny Island. Ukrainian pilots are experimenting with tactics like startling Russian troops before strikes, and in one case, a Russian soldier charging an FPV drone with a bayonet was killed. A Russian infantryman hiding behind a tree was struck by two Ukrainian FPV drones simultaneously. Separately, Iranian-backed militias used a fiber-optic FPV drone to attack the US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport. Ukrainian troops who downed a Russian Ka-52 on the Pokrovsk front were awarded the Order of Courage, 2nd class by Zelensky.
